description: Omni is a business intelligence and semantic-layer platform for querying data, managing models and content, and powering analytics workflows. It also provides an AI-oriented MCP server so external AI clients can query Omni data and search Omni documentation.
summary: Omni exposes a bearer-token HTTP API, an OAuth- or API-key-authenticated MCP server at callbacks.omniapp.co, and an installable Omni CLI with OAuth or API-token auth.
